$comment: Design token file for the Mobile Date Picker - Picker Menu (month & year menu) component
$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Picker Menu - the month/year selection surface shown in the Date Picker 'Month & Year' view. It presents one or two scrollable columns (Month, Year) of text options with column headers, faded far items, and a highlighted current value. NESTED COMPONENTS: the confirm value buttons and the quick-select chips are the existing button and tag components (tokenized in their own files); this file defines only the menu container, column layout, header, and option text tokens. Figma Reference: Node ID 191-35500

$component.name: Picker Menu
$component.description: A month/year picker menu surface. The Default type shows a single option column; the Month & Year type shows two side-by-side columns each with a header and a scrolling list of options that fade with distance from the selection.
$component.structure: Rounded container with padding, holding one or two option columns. Each column has a header label and a vertical list of option rows; far options are muted and the centered option is emphasized. Confirm buttons and quick-select chips sit below (separate components).

usage.contexts: Date Picker Mobile Month & Year view
usage.features: Scrollable option columns, column headers, muted far options, highlighted selection

typography.description: Mobile picker menu column header (Month/Year) typography - 13px medium
